scripts.check:syntax: find src functions -name '*.js' -type f -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
scripts.verify: node scripts/verify-script-order.mjs && node scripts/verify-i18n-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-evolution-contract.mjs && node scripts/verify-leaderboard-contract.mjs && node scripts/test-gameplay-outcomes.mjs && node scripts/test-policy-outcomes.mjs && node scripts/test-leaderboard-remote.mjs && node scripts/test-audio-contract.mjs && node scripts/test-api-boundary.mjs

name: neon-survivor_jh
description: NEON SURVIVOR - a free browser bullet hell survival shooting game with neon swarms, auto-attacking weapons, evolutions, bosses, and mobile-friendly controls.
